title: chionanthus sutepensis
intro: Chionanthus sutepensis, also known as the Sutep Fringe Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae, native to Thailand. It has been traditionally used in medicine, and its leaves and stems are known for their medicinal properties, particularly their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Chionanthus sutepensis include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, with its leaves and stems being used to make herbal tea or infused in hot water for medicinal purposes.
